corrected_assertion: chop-day minAletheiaWeight floor lowered from 0.55 to 0.40. Operator observation: the 0.55 floor was over-trusting the kucoin-scanner emitter (Aletheia trust 0.44) and excluding ensemble entries where the Plutus + Verum components carried the signal. Lower floor 0.40 allows multi-source ensemble entries to fire when Aletheia is weak but other components are strong. The kucoin-scanner trust score itself remains 0.44; this change only affects the floor in the chop-day-specific gate.
source: May-10 amendment-shaped event #4 documented in reference_accretion_pattern_in_mae.md
retention_policy: permanent — revisit on Aletheia trust score change
